{
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z",
  "routineRects": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "name": "instructions",
      "x": 100,
      "y": 200,
      "width": 150,
      "height": 80,
      "avtpComponents": [
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "text",
          "name": "instr_text",
          "text": "STROOP TASK\n\nPress the key that matches the COLOR of the word (not the word itself).\n\nF = Red\nG = Green\nH = Blue\nJ = Yellow\n\nPress SPACE to begin.",
          "color": "white",
          "font": "Arial",
          "letterHeight": 0.05,
          "pos": [0, 0],
          "startTime": 0,
          "duration": -1
        },
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "keyboard",
          "name": "instr_key",
          "keys": "space",
          "startTime": 0,
          "forceEndRoutine": true,
          "store": "nothing"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "trial",
      "x": 350,
      "y": 200,
      "width": 150,
      "height": 80,
      "avtpComponents": [
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "text",
          "name": "fixation",
          "text": "+",
          "color": "white",
          "font": "Arial",
          "letterHeight": 0.08,
          "pos": [0, 0],
          "startTime": 0,
          "duration": 500
        },
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "text",
          "name": "stim",
          "text": "word",
          "color": "red",
          "font": "Arial",
          "letterHeight": 0.15,
          "pos": [0, 0],
          "startTime": 500,
          "duration": 2000,
          "forceEndRoutine": true
        },
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "keyboard",
          "name": "response",
          "keys": "f,g,h,j",
          "startTime": 500,
          "duration": 2000,
          "forceEndRoutine": true,
          "store": "all keys",
          "storeCorrect": true,
          "correctAns": ""
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "name": "end",
      "x": 600,
      "y": 200,
      "width": 150,
      "height": 80,
      "avtpComponents": [
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "text",
          "name": "end_text",
          "text": "Thank you!\n\nYou have completed the task.\n\nPress SPACE to exit.",
          "color": "white",
          "font": "Arial",
          "letterHeight": 0.05,
          "pos": [0, 0],
          "startTime": 0,
          "duration": -1
        },
        {
          "enabled": true,
          "type": "keyboard",
          "name": "end_key",
          "keys": "space",
          "startTime": 0,
          "store": "nothing"
        }
      ]
    }
